meaning: adj.淀粉质的,含淀粉的n.淀粉食物,淀粉体
examples: They alter the way it cleaves amyloid precursor protein.
Amyloid buildup often affects the kidneys, damaging their filtering system.
Not everybody believes that focusing on amyloid is the right way to go, however.
Without its chaperones, the amyloid protein settles in the brain and eventually clusters into plaques.
In addition, results presented last year for our monoclonal antibody solanezumab support the amyloid hypothesis.
